body: Task: Add the smallest backend-stable guard the API surface can depend on for task_update and approval_required enrichment, centered on TaskReadModel::get(...) and ApprovalReadModel::get(...). If current coverage is already enough, add one parity-style proof and stop; do not widen store behavior. Success criteria: a narrow store test or parity guard proves task and approval point lookups are backend-stable for the fields the enriched SSE builders need, and you leave proof or an exact blocker. Relevant files: crates/cairn-store/tests/cross_backend_parity.rs, crates/cairn-store/src/in_memory.rs, crates/cairn-store/src/sqlite/adapter.rs, crates/cairn-store/src/pg/adapter.rs, crates/cairn-store/src/projections/task.rs, crates/cairn-store/src/projections/approval.rs.
